result.reason: VNC connections result in a white screen, indicating a rendering or protocol incompatibility issue with the VncSharpCore library or its configuration within mRemoteNG.
result.approach: Investigate VncSharpCore library usage, version compatibility, and configuration (especially color depth/encoding). Enhance logging around VNC connection and rendering events to identify the root cause, and potentially test with different VNC server types.
